description_long: This object consists of two large, plush armchairs placed side by side, one upholstered in a rich brown leather and the other in a deep black leather. Both armchairs feature wide, padded armrests and a high, tufted backrest with visible button detailing, giving them a classic and luxurious appearance. The seat cushions are thick and slightly indented, indicating softness and comfort, while the backrests are vertically segmented for ergonomic support. The armchairs rest on short, sturdy wooden legs that are slightly angled outward for stability. The leather upholstery has a slightly glossy finish, with visible creases and folds that add to the realistic texture. These armchairs would be suitable for outdoor urban lounges, sidewalk cafes, or park seating areas, providing both comfort and style.
description: A pair of plush, tufted leather armchairs—one brown, one black—with wide padded armrests, high buttoned backrests, and short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing both armchairs side by side, highlighting the tufted backrests, thick seat cushions, and wide padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrests, and the profile of the high backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the smooth, unadorned backs of both armchairs and the short, outward-angled wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the armrest and backrest profile of the brown armchair, with the black armchair partially visible behind.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered in leather
attribute_backrest_style: high, tufted with button detailing, vertically segmented
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted leather with visible button accents
